neighborhoods.name: Como Centro
neighborhoods.description: Elegant lakeside city with a grand Gothic cathedral, silk heritage, and stunning lakefront promenade
neighborhoods.character: Elegant lakeside, silk heritage, cathedral city

housing.predominantType: Apartments in liberty-style and historic buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Stresa. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Lecco
neighborhoods.description: Eastern lake city in a more dramatic mountain setting with Manzoni literary heritage and outdoor culture
neighborhoods.character: Mountain lakeside, literary heritage, outdoor recreation

housing.predominantType: Apartments and houses with lake and mountain views

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Stresa's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Erba / Cantu
neighborhoods.description: Inland towns south of the lake with lower costs, furniture industry heritage, and train connections
neighborhoods.character: Inland towns, affordable, industrial heritage, trains

housing.predominantType: Apartments and houses at lower lake-area prices

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Bellagio / Menaggio
neighborhoods.description: Classic lakeside villages on the central fork with international residents, villas, and celebrity associations
neighborhoods.character: Iconic lakeside, international elite, villa culture

housing.predominantType: Apartments in villas, lakeside houses, and historic properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
